name: Bank Of Bearden
description_short: Bank of Bearden is a traditional community bank offering online banking, checking, savings, and CD products with personalized customer service and local branch access.
description_long:
Bank of Bearden is an established community bank that operates with a traditional brick-and-mortar model, serving customers through a single physical location with extended hours on weekdays and weekend availability. The bank has recently modernized its offerings by launching online banking services, recognizing the need to provide digital access alongside its in-person banking experience. Their service hours reflect a community-focused approach, remaining open Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Friday from 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM, extending Thursday hours until 4:00 PM, and offering Saturday morning service from 9:00 AM to Noon.

Bank of Bearden offers core deposit products including checking accounts, savings accounts, and certificates of deposit (CDs). Their newly launched online banking platform provides customers with instant account access, the ability to view balances and transaction history, online bill payment capabilities, and digital banking convenience. The bank maintains traditional customer service channels including telephone banking and a dedicated line for CD rate inquiries, demonstrating commitment to customer accessibility across multiple platforms.

What distinguishes Bank of Bearden is its deep community integration and personal touch in banking. The bank memorializes significant community members (as evidenced by closure notices for memorial services) and maintains direct customer relationships rather than operating as a large corporate institution. Their recent investment in online banking infrastructure shows adaptation to modern consumer expectations while preserving the local bank identity that builds trust through familiarity and community presence.

As a traditional community bank, Bank of Bearden's primary strength lies in personalized service and local decision-making, though the limited information available on their website prevents comprehensive assessment of competitive interest rates, fee structures, or the full range of products offered. The bank's online banking platform appears functional but basic compared to larger institutions, and limited marketing of specific product features suggests a customer base that may prefer relationship banking over digital-first experiences. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Debit cards with 24/7 lost/stolen card support
pros: Recently launched online banking platform with account access, balance inquiries, and online bill pay functionality
Multiple service channels including in-person banking, telephone banking (870-687-2233), and online access
Extended Thursday hours until 4:00 PM and Saturday morning service at 9:00 AM for working customers
Dedicated customer service line for CD rate inquiries (870-687-2233)
Community-focused institution with personal relationships and local decision-making
24/7 lost or stolen debit card support line (800-500-1044) for emergency assistance
Published identity theft prevention resources and privacy disclosures available on website
cons: Limited business hours (closing at 2:00 PM most weekdays) may be inconvenient for working professionals
Minimal product information published on website; specific rates, fees, and account terms not readily available
Online banking platform appears basic with limited details about advanced features or mobile app availability
Single physical location limits convenience for customers outside the immediate area
No advertised business banking products or commercial lending services visible
best_for: Local community members and customers within proximity to the Bearden branch location
Customers who value personal relationships and local decision-making over large corporate banking
Retirees and individuals with flexible schedules who can visit during published business hours
Depositors seeking CD products with rates available via phone inquiry
diagnosis: Bank of Bearden is best for customers in or near the Bearden area who prioritize personal service, community connection, and local banking relationships over extensive digital features or competitive rate shopping. The main caveat is that specific product rates, fees, and account terms are not published online, requiring direct customer contact to compare offerings against larger regional or national banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
